start.q: How does the digital employee work?
start.a: The digital employee is an AI trained on your salon info. It responds to clients, books appointments, and answers inquiries via WhatsApp, Telegram, and your website.

billing.a: Tokens are deducted based on conversation length. Each replied message consumes a small amount of tokens. You can track usage in real-time from the dashboard.

custom.q: Can I change the agent's name or personality?
custom.a: Yes, from Settings, you can customize the name, tone of voice, and knowledge to reflect your salon's brand.

limit.q: What happens if I run out of tokens?
limit.a: If you run out of tokens, the agent will temporarily stop responding. You can recharge immediately from the Billing page to resume service.

bookings.q: How do I get booking reports?
bookings.a: All bookings are recorded in the Bookings page in your dashboard, where you can view, confirm, or cancel them easily.

how.title: How It Works
how.step1_desc: Enter your salon details, services, and working hours in minutes.
how.step2_desc: Link your Instagram, Messenger, and Telegram accounts in one click.
how.step3_desc: The assistant replies to clients, books appointments, and remembers every preference.

features.title: Everything You Need in One Place
features.ai_desc: A smart assistant that understands Arabic and English and responds professionally to client questions.
features.booking_desc: Accepts and records appointments directly in your system without manual intervention.
features.multi_desc: Instagram, Messenger, Telegram — all managed from one dashboard.
features.memory_desc: The assistant remembers every client's preferences and past visit history.
features.reports_desc: Daily and weekly stats on conversations, bookings, and revenue.
features.tokens_desc: Pay only for what you use — unused tokens roll over to the next month.

testimonials.title: What Salon Owners Are Saying
testimonials.t1_text: I used to spend all my time answering messages. Now the AI handles it and I focus on my work.
testimonials.t2_text: My clients love how fast the responses are. They say it feels like having a dedicated assistant 24/7!
testimonials.t3_text: Bookings increased 40% in the first month because the AI responds even late at night.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need technical experience to use the platform?
faq.a1: Not at all. Setup takes less than 5 minutes with a simple, user-friendly interface.
faq.a2: Instagram, Messenger (Facebook), and Telegram. WhatsApp is in development and coming soon.
faq.q3: What's the difference between Starter and Pro plans?
faq.a3: The main difference is monthly token count (200 vs 400) and priority support in the Pro plan.
faq.q4: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a4: Yes. No binding contracts. Cancel anytime from your dashboard.
faq.q5: How does the token system work?
faq.a5: Each reply consumes one token. Unused tokens roll over to the next month and are never lost.
faq.q6: Can the assistant book appointments directly?
faq.a6: Yes. It can accept appointments and log them in the booking system automatically based on availability.
faq.q7: Is my data and client data secure?
faq.a7: Absolutely. We use Supabase with full encryption. Your data is yours and will never be shared.
faq.q8: Can I customize the assistant's responses?
faq.a8: Yes. From the setup page you can customize the assistant name, reply tone, available services, and working hours.
